name: Warm Pasta and Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Fresh spinach, washed, stems removed and torn into bite-size pieces (10 oz)
7 oz MUELLER'S Pasta Swirls, cooked, rinsed with cold water and drained
1 cup HELLMANN'S or BEST FOODS Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large serving bowl, toss spinach, mushrooms, pasta and red onion.
2. In a medium skillet, cook bacon over medium-high heat until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon.
3. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons drippings.
4. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch, sugar, salt and pepper.
5. With a wire whisk, stir the cornstarch mixture into the drippings in the skillet until smooth.
6. Stir in mayonnaise until blended.
7. Gradually stir in water and vinegar.
8. Over medium heat, bring the mixture to a boil; stir constantly.
9. Boil 1 minute.
10. Pour over spinach mixture. Add bacon; toss to coat well.
11. Serve immediately.
Makes 8-10 servings.
